rationale: Built self-contained det.rs by inlining the type/trait/struct/impl context (the original det.rs was a stub lacking imports and definitions). Inside the LLM PROOF BLOCK, proved GLB uniqueness for greatest_lower_bound_index: if two indices r1, r2 both yield GLBs of iter, the keys at those indices must coincide. Case split on whether g1/g2 equals iter or is strictly less; the equals-iter case derives a contradiction via the gap/between witness (iter's key would be inside the gap interval, contradicting its membership); the both-less case applies the GLB forall in both directions to derive k1<k2 and k2<k1, contradiction via K::cmp_properties asymmetry. Finally used strict sortedness of keys to conclude r1==r2. Verus exits 0 with 7 verified, 0 errors (deprecation warnings only).
